page_metadata.biotools__summary:
A database for miRNAs and their targets in acute lymphoblastic leukemia.

Acute Lymphoblastic Leukemia (ALL) is one of the most common heterogeneous diseases observed in paediatric age group and it differs in both, immunophenotypic and molecular characters.
